name: Shiden Iida
description:
Shiden Iida is the captain of the Brísingamen Squadron, also known as the Queen's Knights, which was the group that led the defense of the Republic during the large-scale offensive held by the Legion. Her Personal Name Cyclops originates from her heterochromia, as she appears to only have one working eye.

Following the rescue of the Republic by the Federacy, her squadron volunteered for the Eighty-Sixth Strike Package. Shiden and the Brísingamen Squadron are now in charge of defending the mobile headquarters—Vanadis.
